entities.name: Fireflies Webhook Receiver
entities.context: Receives Fireflies.ai transcript-completed webhooks and logs them to SQLite for the meeting pipeline.

entities.name: Fillout Intake Event Bridge
entities.context: Webhook-based event bridge from Fillout form submissions into local JSONL logs for analysis.

entities.name: Akiflow Actions Bridge
entities.context: Bridges meeting-derived action items into Akiflow via Aki email workflows.

entities.name: ZoBridge
entities.context: AI-to-AI bridge between ParentZo and ChildZo using the ZoBridge protocol.

entities.name: Fireflies.ai
entities.context: Organization associated with the Fireflies Webhook Receiver.

entities.name: Fillout
entities.context: Organization associated with the Fillout Intake Event Bridge.

entities.name: Akiflow
entities.context: Organization associated with the Akiflow Actions Bridge.

relationships.context: The tool utilizes the Fireflies.ai service for webhook processing.
The tool utilizes the Fillout service for form submissions.
The tool utilizes Akiflow for managing action items.
Links ParentZo as a part of the AI-to-AI bridge.
Links ChildZo as a part of the AI-to-AI bridge.
